name: Pita Chicken Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breast fillets, boneless and skinless, about 1 1/4 pounds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a non-stick skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat for approximately 2 minutes.
2. Add chicken and cook for about 6 minutes. Turn the chicken, add onion, and cook for another 6 minutes or until the onion is clear and the chicken is tender.
3. Remove from heat and cut the chicken into thin slices across the grain of the breast. Place in a bowl.
4. Add sautéed onion; sprinkle with salt and pepper, mixing carefully.
5. Add vinegar and chives; mix well.
6. In a small bowl, mix together yogurt and shredded cucumber.
7. On each piece of pita bread, spread 2 tablespoons of the yogurt-cucumber sauce.
8. Place 1/4 of the chicken mixture on each pita bread, fold in half, wrap in plastic wrap, and chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
9. Repeat for remaining sandwiches.
Makes 4 servings (2 wedges each).
NOTE: For a picnic, place sandwiches in an ice chest or insulated container until serving time. Cut each sandwich in half to serve.
